pageText.title: Trouble: An AA Style Step 10
pageText.subTitle: When you literally cannot control yourself, you need help from a power greater than yourself.

questions: Did I avoid anger & resentment today?
Was I honest in every situation & with everyone today?
Did I stay out of selfishness & self-centeredness today?
Did I make amends for any hurts I may have caused today?
Did I stay out of self-pity today?
Did I try to be kind and loving with everyone today?
If my feelings were hurt today, did I forgive?
Did I stay close to my H.P, asking to do his will today?
Did I reach out to another alcoholic today?
Did I go to an A.A. meeting today?
Did I read my Big Book or the 12 & 12 today?
Did I get humble on my knees today?
